name: Gladiator
description: An arena-trained combatant whose presence is as dangerous as their weapon. Skill Proficiencies: Performance, Intimidation. Equipment Option A: Spear, Shortbow, 20 Arrows, Healer's Kit, Quiver, Traveler's Clothes, 14 CP. Equipment Option B: 50 CP. Features: Arena Training; Armor Optimization. Custom feat: Gladiator Training (see Tavern Brawler).
